response:
Dear [Sender's Name],  
Thank you for your kind email and providing the information on behalf of the Libas team. While I am familiar with le Bal, I appreciate you attaching the History of the event and the general information for reference. It's exciting to hear that Hannah will be wearing G Hobeika Haute Couture for le Bal, which is scheduled for Saturday, November 25, 2023. I will make a note of the important dates you mentioned: photos and videos starting on Thursday, November 23, and Friday, November 24 dedicated to photo shoots, with the waltz rehearsal at the end of the day. I will definitely check le Bal's website and Instagram, lebal.paris, for photos and videos. If there is any additional information or specific details you feel would be useful to know, please do not hesitate to share them. To arrange an interview with Hannah, I will connect with her mother Blair, who is cc'd on this email, for further coordination. If you believe it would be beneficial, we can also schedule a Zoom meeting in early September to discuss the upcoming event in more detail. Thank you once again for reaching out and offering any additional information that may be helpful. I look forward to staying in touch and ensuring comprehensive coverage of le Bal.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
